title: triticum triaristatum
intro: Triticum triaristatum, also known as three-awned wheat or three-awned grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to certain parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Triticum triaristatum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
